signal.description: Manufacturing partners already hold FDA 510(k) and CE MDR certificates for core Phase 1 products (Trocars, Clips, Sutures).

alignedInsights.description: ViaSurg can enter the US/EU market in weeks rather than years by using the OBL (Relabeler/Repackager) registration model instead of new 510(k) filings.
alignedInsights.conclusion: Prioritize OBL registration for Phase 1 products (Trocars, Clips, Guidewires).

signal.description: Evidence of significant trust deficit in B2B procurement of 'Black Box' Chinese OEM products. Customers increasingly demand verifiable proof of compliance.
